issues_found: Source is explicitly classified as 'homepage' in metadata - violates CORE RULE 5 (reject homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, search_page)
No publication date (published_at is empty) - cannot assess recency or staleness
No specific current analysis, data, or actionable research content - just static institutional description
event_type set to 'unknown' - appropriate but further confirms this is not a policy/event document
Contains only general mandate description without any specific financial stability risks or vulnerabilities
human_review_reason: Clear reject per explicit rules - homepage is non-archiveable

corrected_fields.summary: This is an institutional overview page for the Financial Stability Oversight Council (FSOC) describing its general mandate under the Dodd-Frank Act. The page outlines FSOC's composition, responsibilities, and areas of monitoring, but contains no specific current analysis, data, or publication date. No specific financial stability risks or vulnerabilities are quantified or dated in this source.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page serves as an entry point to FSOC but provides no actionable intelligence. The actual value would be in specific FSOC annual reports or meeting minutes, not this static institutional description.
